files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/health.py b/app/api/routes/health.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/health.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/health.py
@@ -7,12 +7,16 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
 import httpx
+import time
+from datetime import datetime
 
 from fastapi import APIRouter
 
 from app.core.config import get_settings
 from app.core.logging import get_logger
 from app.rag.vector_store import ChromaStore
+
+START_TIME = time.time()
 
 logger = get_logger(__name__)
 router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/health", tags=["health"])
@@ -47,11 +51,14 @@
         logger.warning("ChromaDB health check failed: %s", exc)
 
     status = "ok" if (ollama_ok and chroma_ok) else "degraded"
+    uptime_seconds = int(time.time() - START_TIME)
+    
     return {
         "status": status,
         "ollama": ollama_ok,
         "chromadb": chroma_ok,
         "llm_model": settings.OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL,
         "embed_model": settings.OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL,
+        "uptime": f"{uptime_seconds}s",
+        "server_time": datetime.now().isoformat(),
     }

scenarios.title: Health check returns ok when all dependencies are healthy
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'ok' with correct dependency status when both Ollama and ChromaDB are accessible
preconditions: Ollama service is running and reachable at OLLAMA_BASE_URL
ChromaDB is initialized and collection is accessible
scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns HTTP 200 with status 'ok', ollama=true, chromadb=true, and configured llm_model name

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded when Ollama is unreachable
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint gracefully handles Ollama unavailability and returns 'degraded' status
preconditions: Ollama service is stopped or OLLAMA_BASE_URL is misconfigured
scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns HTTP 200 with status 'degraded', ollama=false, chromadb=true, and logs warning about failed Ollama health check

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded when ChromaDB fails to initialize
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint handles ChromaDB initialization failure gracefully
preconditions: Ollama service is running and reachable
ChromaDB is unavailable or collection fails to initialize
scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns HTTP 200 with status 'degraded', ollama=true, chromadb=false, and logs warning about failed ChromaDB health check

scenarios.title: Health check handles Ollama request timeout
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint handles timeout when Ollama does not respond within 3 seconds
preconditions: Ollama service is running but delayed (response time > 3 seconds)

steps.value: Ollama mock with 5 second delay on /api/tags endpoint

scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint times out after 3 seconds, returns status 'degraded' with ollama=false without hanging the request

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded when all dependencies are down
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint handles complete system failure gracefully
scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns HTTP 200 with status 'degraded', both ollama and chromadb set to false, logs warnings for both failures

scenarios.title: Health check handles concurrent requests without race conditions
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint handles multiple simultaneous requests correctly

steps.assertion: all responses have matching llm_model value

scenarios.expected_result: All 10 concurrent requests complete successfully with consistent response data

scenarios.title: Health check does not expose sensitive configuration values
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint response does not leak sensitive settings like connection strings, API keys, or internal URLs
preconditions: Application has sensitive configuration in settings (API keys, passwords)

steps.assertion: response body contains only allowed fields: status, ollama, chromadb, llm_model
response does not contain OLLAMA_BASE_URL value
response does not contain any password or secret fields

scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns only safe fields (status, ollama, chromadb, llm_model) without exposing OLLAMA_BASE_URL or any sensitive configuration

scenarios.title: Health check handles malformed response from Ollama
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint handles unexpected response format from Ollama /api/tags endpoint
preconditions: Ollama mock returns non-200 status or malformed JSON

steps.value: Ollama mock returns 500 Internal Server Error on /api/tags

scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint gracefully handles Ollama 500 error, returns degraded status without crashing

scenarios.title: Health check verifies Ollama endpoint returns 200 status specifically
scenarios.description: Verify health check only considers Ollama healthy when /api/tags returns HTTP 200
scenarios.expected_result: Health check returns ollama=true only for HTTP 200, ollama=false for any other status code

scenarios.title: Health check handles network connection refused to Ollama
scenarios.description: Verify health endpoint handles connection refused exception gracefully
scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint catches connection exception, logs warning, and returns degraded status without stack trace

scenarios.title: Health endpoint returns correct llm_model from settings
scenarios.description: Verify the health response includes the configured OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL value
preconditions: OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL is configured in application settings
scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns the exact llm_model string configured in settings
